# Requirement: FR-004

- Title: Display-only reviews section
- Status: Active

## Requirement Statement

The system shall display a curated reviews section with static testimonial cards including reviewer name, review text, and optional project reference, sourced from schema-validated repository-local content records.

## Rationale

Without visible testimonials, prospective clients lack third-party validation of quality and outcomes. A curated reviews section provides social proof near the contact conversion path.

## Acceptance Conditions

- Reviews section renders static testimonial cards from repository-local content records.
- Each card includes reviewer name, review text, and optional project reference.
- Invalid review records fail schema validation and block merge.

## Success Metrics

- Reviews section renders without errors.
- At least one review record validates against schema in CI.

## Non-Goals

- Review submission workflow, moderation queue, spam scoring (Phase 3).

## Constraints

- Static-first; display-only; no dynamic data ingestion in Phase 2.
